privileged_info_summary: The task is generative and synthetic, requiring the agent to create a new snippet in Rocket.Chat based solely on prompt instructions. Verified that the expected target channel ('release-updates'), the exact required file name ('rollback_procedure.sh'), and the precise snippet content provided in the prompt explicitly match the evaluation scripts and verifier logic.
